'''ngajodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockerin|dockerin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockerin|dockerin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngajodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjedheth|ngæjedheth]] || [[word:ngæjedhej|ngæjedhej]] || [[word:ngæjedhesh|ngæjedhesh]] || [[word:ngæjedhe|ngæjedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajojodhoth|ngajojodhoth]] || [[word:ngajojodhoj|ngajojodhoj]] || [[word:ngajojodhosh|ngajojodhosh]] || [[word:ngajojodho|ngajojodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajodhoth|ngajodhoth]] || [[word:ngajodhoj|ngajodhoj]] || [[word:ngajodhosh|ngajodhosh]] || [[word:ngajodho|ngajodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajofdhoth|ngajofdhoth]] || [[word:ngajofdhoj|ngajofdhoj]] || [[word:ngajofdhosh|ngajofdhosh]] || [[word:ngajofdhof|ngajofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajodhotho|ngajodhotho]] || [[word:ngajodhojo|ngajodhojo]] || [[word:ngajodhosho|ngajodhosho]] || [[word:ngajodhoko|ngajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajodhoth|ngajodhoth]] || [[word:ngajodhoj|ngajodhoj]] || [[word:ngajodhosh|ngajodhosh]] || [[word:ngajodho|ngajodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajodhothol|ngajodhothol]] || [[word:ngajodhojol|ngajodhojol]] || [[word:ngajodhoshol|ngajodhoshol]] || [[word:ngajodhokol|ngajodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajodhothotho|ngajodhothotho]] || [[word:ngajodhojojo|ngajodhojojo]] || [[word:ngajodhoshosho|ngajodhoshosho]] || [[word:ngajodhoko|ngajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajodhothon|ngajodhothon]] || [[word:ngajodhojon|ngajodhojon]] || [[word:ngajodhoshon|ngajodhoshon]] || [[word:ngajodhokon|ngajodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajodhothoro|ngajodhothoro]] || [[word:ngajodhojoro|ngajodhojoro]] || [[word:ngajodhoshoro|ngajodhoshoro]] || [[word:ngajodhokoro|ngajodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
